findings.description: Section s3 covers 未検討 and 取り下げ subsections in its body content but neither term appears in the hints array. Users asking about withdrawn or unconsidered requirements would not be routed here.
findings.source_evidence: Source 要求 section contains subsections '未検討' and '取り下げ' with substantive content about features not being pursued.

findings.description: SimpleDbTransactionManager is a required dependency for the dbManager property and is referenced by class name in the configuration XML and property table, but is absent from s5 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 'nablarch.core.db.transaction.SimpleDbTransactionManagerクラスのインスタンスを指定する' — a required property whose type is a concrete named class.
